_comment: Crate Priority config - edit this file to customize next-action priorities during Supplies.
_howToUse: This file is valid JSON. Do not use // or /* */ comments. Use keys like _comment or _guide if you want to leave notes.
After editing this file, save it and run /iq reload. You do NOT need to restart the game.
'priorities' is grouped by your current pre spot: X, SLASH, EQUALS, TRIANGLE.
Inside each pre spot, the key is the missing/no-pre call and the value is the destination shown by Crate Priority.
You can edit only the entries you want. Missing/invalid entries fall back to built-in defaults.
Accepted missing keys: X, X_CANNON (or XC/XCANNON), SQUARE, SLASH, EQUALS (or EQ), TRIANGLE (or TRI), SHOP.

rootFields.priorities: Main mapping object used by Crate Priority.

priorityFields.destination value: Destination text shown as 'Go <value>' in the Crate Priority widget.
